failure.data_location_pin_failed: Cherry Studio could not save the selected data location.
failure.database_initialize_failed: Cherry Studio could not initialize the migration database.
failure.legacy_data_location_unavailable: The previous custom data directory is not currently accessible.
failure.migration_status_probe_failed: Cherry Studio could not check the migration status.
failure.migration_window_failed: Cherry Studio could not open the migration window.
failure.path_resolution_failed: Cherry Studio could not resolve the migration data location.
failure.title: Migration diagnostics
failure.version_check_failed: Cherry Studio could not verify the required upgrade path.
failure.version_window_failed: Cherry Studio could not open the upgrade guidance window.

recovery.message: Cherry Studio found diagnostics from an unfinished migration. You can save them before retrying.
recovery.title: Previous migration interrupted

save.failedMessage: The diagnostic bundle could not be saved. No data was uploaded or sent.
save.savedMessage: The diagnostic bundle was saved. Attach it when contacting the Cherry Studio developers.
save.title: Save migration diagnostic bundle

support.emailBody: Please describe the migration issue and manually attach the saved diagnostic ZIP.

failure.data_location_pin_failed: 无法保存选定的数据目录。
failure.database_initialize_failed: 无法初始化迁移数据库。
failure.legacy_data_location_unavailable: 之前的自定义数据目录当前不可访问。
failure.path_resolution_failed: 无法确定迁移数据目录。
failure.renderer_process_gone: 迁移窗口意外停止运行。
failure.title: 迁移诊断
failure.version_check_failed: 无法验证必需的升级路径。
failure.version_window_failed: 无法打开升级指引窗口。

recovery.message: 检测到未完成迁移的诊断信息。您可以在重试前先保存诊断包。
recovery.title: 上次迁移已中断

save.failedMessage: 诊断包保存失败。未上传或发送任何数据。
save.savedMessage: 诊断包已保存。联系 Cherry Studio 开发者时请手动附上该文件。
save.title: 保存迁移诊断包

support.emailBody: 请描述迁移问题，并手动附上已保存的诊断 ZIP 文件。
